faqs.question: What does the $350-$550 yellow jacket removal service include?
faqs.answer: Our service includes complete inspection, safe nest elimination using professional-grade treatments, removal of accessible nests, and a follow-up guarantee. Pricing depends on nest location, size, and accessibility. Ground nests and easily accessible areas are typically at the lower end, while wall voids or high locations may cost more.

faqs.question: Are yellow jackets common in Flatlands neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, yellow jackets are very common in Flatlands due to the area's residential character with yards, gardens, and proximity to Marine Park. They often build nests in roof eaves, under decks, in wall cavities of older homes, and in ground burrows throughout the neighborhood, becoming especially aggressive in late summer and fall.
